crossword.name: 낱말퀴즈
crossword.subtitle: Korean Crossword Puzzles
crossword.description: A fresh crossword puzzle every day
crossword.intro: A retro newspaper-style Korean crossword puzzle app. Each hint comes from the Korean Basic Dictionary, so you naturally build your vocabulary as you play.
features: Accurate clues from the National Institute of Korean Language dictionary
Auto-save so you can pick up where you left off
Use hints to reveal letters when you're stuck

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.overview: 낱말퀴즈 ("the App") is developed by Ullim Studio. This privacy policy explains how we handle your information.
privacyPolicy.data: The App does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. Game progress and settings are stored locally on your device only.
privacyPolicy.thirdParty: The App uses the following third-party services:
privacyPolicy.admob: We display advertisements through Google AdMob. AdMob may collect and use data to serve personalized or non-personalized ads. This may include device identifiers, IP address, and usage data.
privacyPolicy.children: The App is rated 4+ and does not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacyPolicy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.
privacyPolicy.contact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:

support.title: 낱말퀴즈 - Support
support.contactDesc: For questions, feedback, or bug reports, please email us at:
howToPlay: Read the across/down clues and fill in the blanks.
Tap a cell to see the clue for that word.
Complete all cells to auto-check your answers.

faq.a: Yes, game progress is automatically saved to your device.
Yes, all puzzles are included in the app and can be played without an internet connection.

minesweeper.name: Minesweeper Swipe
minesweeper.subtitle: Classic Puzzle, Swipe to Flag
minesweeper.intro: The classic Minesweeper you know and love, reimagined for touchscreen. Three gestures. Zero wait time. Every action is instant.
features: Tap to reveal, swipe up to flag, tap a number to chord
Three difficulty levels — Beginner (9×9), Intermediate (16×16), Expert (16×30)
Personal records, win rates, and game history per difficulty
One small banner ad, removable with a one-time purchase

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.overview: Minesweeper Swipe ("the App") is developed by Ullim Studio. This privacy policy explains how we handle your information.
privacyPolicy.data: The App itself does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. Game records and settings are stored locally on your device only.
privacyPolicy.thirdParty: The App uses the following third-party services:
privacyPolicy.admob: We display banner advertisements through Google AdMob. AdMob may collect and use data to serve personalized or non-personalized ads. This may include device identifiers, IP address, and usage data.
privacyPolicy.gameCenter: The App integrates with Apple Game Center for leaderboards. Game Center is managed by Apple and subject to Apple's Privacy Policy.
privacyPolicy.iap: The App offers an in-app purchase to remove advertisements. Purchases are processed by Apple and subject to Apple's terms.
privacyPolicy.children: The App is rated 4+ and does not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacyPolicy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.
privacyPolicy.contact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:

support.title: Minesweeper Swipe - Support
support.contactDesc: For questions, feedback, or bug reports, please email us at:
howToPlay: Swipe Up — Place or remove a flag
Tap Number — Reveal neighbors (when flags match number)

faq.q: How do I restore my ad removal purchase?
faq.a: Go to Records screen and tap "Restore Purchase" at the bottom.

faq.q: How do I reset my records?
faq.a: Go to Records screen and tap "Clear Records" at the bottom.

jotDaily.name: Jot Daily
jotDaily.subtitle: The simplest way to journal your day
jotDaily.intro: Jot Daily is a minimalist journaling app that captures your day in text only. No calendars, no stickers, no photos. Just words. Like the resonance of white space, it lets you focus on the act of writing itself.
features: Minimal design focused purely on text
Unlimited entries — write as much as you want
Search to instantly find past entries

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.overview: Jot Daily ("the App") is developed by Ullim Studio. This privacy policy explains how we handle your information.
privacyPolicy.data: The App does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to external servers. All journal entries are stored locally on your device only.
privacyPolicy.thirdParty: The App uses the following third-party services:
privacyPolicy.googleDrive: Pro users can back up their entries to Google Drive. The App authenticates via Google Sign-In and uses only the drive.file scope, accessing only backup files created by the App. It does not access any other files on your Google Drive.
privacyPolicy.analytics: We use Firebase Analytics to understand app usage patterns (screen views, feature usage frequency, etc.). The content of your journal entries (text) is never collected.
privacyPolicy.iap: The App offers an in-app purchase to unlock Pro features. Purchases are processed by Apple and subject to Apple's terms.
privacyPolicy.children: The App is rated 4+ and does not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacyPolicy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.
privacyPolicy.contact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:

support.title: Jot Daily - Support
support.contactDesc: For questions, feedback, or bug reports, please email us at:
howToUse: Tap the + button at the bottom to write today's entry.
Tap an entry to edit it.
Use the arrows at the top to browse entries by month.

faq.a: All entries are stored on your device only. Google Drive backup is available as a Pro feature.

faq.q: Can I transfer my entries to another device?
faq.a: Purchase Pro, back up to Google Drive, then restore on the new device.

faq.q: How do I restore my Pro purchase?
faq.a: Go to Settings > Google Drive Backup and tap "Restore Purchase".

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.overview: Zuehane ("the App") is a private family app developed by Ullim Studio. This privacy policy explains how we handle your information.
privacyPolicy.data: The App collects and stores the following data on our server for sharing among family members: Google account information (name, email, profile photo), health records, meal records and photos, family calendar events, announcements, and comments. This data is only accessible to members of the same family group.
privacyPolicy.thirdParty: The App uses the following third-party services:
privacyPolicy.googleAuth: The App uses Google Sign-In for authentication. Google processes data during the authentication flow and is subject to Google's Privacy Policy.
privacyPolicy.permissions: The App requests camera access for taking photos of meals and test results, and photo library access for attaching images. These permissions are only activated when using the respective features.
privacyPolicy.security: The App is a private application accessible only to invited family members. Data is transmitted over encrypted connections and only accessible to authenticated users.
privacyPolicy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.
privacyPolicy.contact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:
